settings.label: Which child are you registering?
Which unit are they in?
What level are you registering for?
Previous Award Details
settings.description:
To register for your {dynamic.signup_level} award, tell us about your previous level.

If you are registered with another organisation, we will contact you to confirm you are willing to transfer your DofE to Scouts Scotland.

settings.label: What sections have you completed in your bronze award?
settings.help_message: Select the sections of your bronze award that are marked complete in eDofE.

advanced_options.label: I haven't done a bronze award
advanced_options.value: I haven't done a bronze award

settings.label: What sections have you completed in your silver award?
settings.help_message: Select the sections of your silver award that are marked complete in eDofE.

advanced_options.label: I haven't done a silver award
advanced_options.value: I haven't done a silver award

settings.label: Are you already registered in eDofE?

advanced_options.label: Yes - but I have forgotten / lost it

settings.label: My eDofE number
settings.help_message: You can find this in eDofE. If it is with another organisation, we will contact you to confirm you are willing to transfer your DofE to Scouts Scotland.

numeric.message: This field must contain numeric value
numeric.global_message: This field must contain numeric value

settings.label: The other organisation is
settings.help_message: Enter the name of the other organisation you are registered with
settings.unique_validation_message: This value need to be unique.

settings.label: Would you like to register for an expedition with Explorers?
What kind of expedition do you want to do?
What are your preferred practice expedition dates?
settings.help_message:
Select as many dates as possible to help us with planning.
The actual dates when we run events depend on how many Explorers sign up, and the dates we finally offer may differ from what's listed above.

settings.label: What are your preferred qualifing expedition dates?
settings.help_message:
Select as many dates as possible to help us with planning.
The actual dates when we run events depend on how many Explorers sign up, and the dates we finally offer may differ from what's listed above.

settings.label: Who would you like to do your expedition with?
settings.help_message: We can't guarantee team composition but we'll do our best. Team composition depends on things like how many explorers sign up, the dates they can do, and so on.
settings.unique_validation_message: This value need to be unique.

settings.label: Do you have any additional support needs that we must accommodate?
settings.help_message: To help us plan, tell us about any conditions that we need to take into account when organising training or expeditions.

settings.label: First aid qualifications
settings.description:
Expedition teams require access to first aid.

If your team does not have enough people with first aid qualifications, you will need to complete those before being allowed to do an expedition.

We will provide information about training options in due course.

settings.label: Do you hold a first aid qualification?
When does your qualification expire?
Payment
settings.description: This is for the participant place ONLY. Expedition fees are charged separately and depend on the options selected. These will be communicated separately when your expedition place is confirmed.

settings.label: Participant Place Cost

settings.cart_empty_text: No payment items has been selected yet

settings.label: Payment Method

settings.tnc_html: I agree to enrol as a participant on the DofE programme at the specified level. I understand that I will manage my DofE programme using the eDofE system. This system is run by DofE and its terms and conditions are available at https://edofe.org/ I have read these terms and conditions and agree to them.
